message:
feat(ui): enhance tooltip system with improved positioning and styling

Major improvements to the core tooltip infrastructure for better
cross-device compatibility and visual consistency.

tooltip-shell.tsx:
- Improve tooltip positioning algorithm with better viewport clamping
- Add configurable tooltip width with sensible defaults
- Enhance scroll and resize handling for dynamic repositioning
- Refine animation timing for smoother open/close transitions
- Improve touch device detection with runtime media query checks
- Add better accessibility with improved focus management
- Optimize portal rendering for reduced layout thrashing

math-tooltip.tsx:
- Refine variant color mappings for better visual hierarchy
- Improve tooltip content structure with better spacing
- Add support for simple mode with reduced content
- Enhance icon styling consistency across variants
- Improve mobile sheet content formatting

These changes ensure tooltips behave consistently across desktop,
tablet, and mobile devices while maintaining visual polish.

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
